cleaning_steps.name: negative_x_to_abs
cleaning_steps.description: Coerce negative reactance to |X| (series capacitors in PSS/E convention)

cleaning_steps.name: zero_x_to_small
cleaning_steps.description: Set zero reactance to 0.0001 pu (prevents singular admittance matrix)

cleaning_steps.name: zero_r_to_small
cleaning_steps.description: Set zero resistance to 0.0001 pu (prevents NR Jacobian instability)

cleaning_steps.name: zero_rate_a_to_unlimited
cleaning_steps.description: Set zero thermal rating to 9999 MVA (disambiguates unlimited vs zero capacity)

cleaning_steps.name: island_extraction
cleaning_steps.description: Extract largest connected island (tiny islands cause multi-slack issues)

cleaning_steps.name: single_slack_bus
cleaning_steps.description: Ensure exactly one slack (type-3) bus per connected component

note: Import this case directly — all cleaning pre-applied, ready for power flow
